---
title: "260227 LB figs"
date: "2026-02-18"
---

# preamble and loading

figs for LB/committee update


```{r load libs and utils, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
#library(survminer)
library(patchwork)

here::i_am("outputs/2026-02_LB/tbd.Rmd")
library(here)

source(here("_ntw/scripts/utils/wrangle.R"))
source(here("_ntw/scripts/utils/analysis.R"))
```

```{r load data, warning=FALSE}
source(here("_ntw/scripts/R/tidy-dev.R"))
dfs_imported <- list(
  ntw_wide = dfs_tidy$wide,
  ntw_long = dfs_tidy$long
)
dfs_imported <- dfs_imported %>%
  lapply(., \(x){
    x %>%
      mutate(trt = as.factor(trt))
  })

rm(dfs_tidy)
```


# 2x2 results
- pupation big 3

## wrangle

```{r}
# pivot
dfs_ntw <- list(
  ss_dev = dfs_imported$ntw_long %>%
    filter(year == 2023,
           pop == "lab" & diet == "LD",
           instar == "pupa",
           is.ntw %in% c(0, 2)) %>% 
    mutate(mass = mass/1000,
           devrate = 1/tt,
           across(starts_with("trt"), as.factor)) %>%
    group_by(trt.meanT, trt.flucT) %>% 
    summarise(n = n(),
              avg.mass = mean(mass, na.rm = TRUE),
              se.mass = se(mass),
              avg.devrate = mean(devrate, na.rm = TRUE),
              se.devrate = se(devrate)),
  
  ss_surv = dfs_imported$ntw_wide %>%
    filter(year == 2023,
           pop == "lab" & diet == "LD",
           is.ntw %in% c(0, 2)) %>%
    mutate(across(starts_with("trt"), as.factor)) %>%
    group_by(trt.meanT, trt.flucT) %>%
    summarise(n.surv = sum(is.pup == 1),
              p.surv = n.surv/sum(is.pup %in% c(0, 1)),
              se.surv = se.prop(p.surv, n.surv))
)
```

## big 3

```{r}
.plotfn <- function(x){
  x %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = trt.meanT,
               lty = trt.flucT, shape = trt.flucT,
               group = trt.flucT)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(width = 0.08, lty = "solid",
                  show.legend = FALSE)
}

p1 <- dfs_ntw$ss_surv %>%
  .plotfn() +
  aes(y = p.surv,
      ymax = p.surv + se.surv,
      ymin = p.surv - se.surv) +
  ylim(c(0, 1)) +
  labs(y = "proportion survived to pupation") 

p2 <- dfs_ntw$ss_dev %>%
  .plotfn() +
  aes(y = avg.mass,
      ymax = avg.mass + se.mass,
      ymin = avg.mass - se.mass) +
  labs(y = "pupal mass (g)") 

p3 <- dfs_ntw$ss_dev %>%
  .plotfn() +
  aes(y = avg.devrate,
      ymax = avg.devrate + se.devrate,
      ymin = avg.devrate - se.devrate) +
  labs(y = "development rate (1/days)")

(p1 + p2 + p3) +
  plot_layout(axes = "collect", 
              guides = "collect",
              widths = c(1, 1, 1)
              ) &
  labs(x = "mean temperature (°C)",
       lty = "fluctuation (°C)", shape = "fluctuation (°C)") &
  scale_shape_discrete(labels = c("±0", "±7")) &
  scale_linetype_discrete(labels = c("±0", "±7")) &
  theme_bw() &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

```
